hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push|git reset --hard|rm -rf|supabase db reset'; then echo 'BLOCKED: gevaarlijk commando' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.claude/audit-output/PULSE-AUDIT-BUNDLE*|*.claude/audit-output/PULSE-FIX-BUNDLE*) echo 'BLOCKED: bundle-docs zijn read-only' >&2; exit 2 ;; */supabase/migrations/2026010*|*/supabase/migrations/2026020*|*/supabase/migrations/2026030*|*/supabase/migrations/2026040*) echo 'BLOCKED: wijzigen bestaande migratie verboden. Maak een nieuwe via: supabase migration new <naam>' >&2; exit 2 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5) || true ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac
